notes: Greece should score Greek as the official language while giving strong English credit because official tourism guidance says a large majority of people in the tourist industry speak English and that most Greeks have a good command of it.

evidence.title: Visit Greece FAQ
evidence.note: Official tourism guidance says Greek is the official language and that a large majority of people in the tourist industry speak English.

evidence.title: Visit Greece brochures
evidence.note: The Greek National Tourism Organisation publishes visitor materials widely in English, reflecting strong English support for travelers.

notes: Slovenia should score Slovene as the national language while giving strong English credit because official tourism guidance explicitly says most people in Slovenia speak English.

evidence.title: I Feel Slovenia: Places to go
evidence.note: Official tourism guidance says that, in addition to Slovenian, most people in Slovenia speak English.

evidence.title: I Feel Slovenia homepage
evidence.note: The official tourism homepage repeats that most people in Slovenia speak English.
